headline: Starbucks' Schultz left Seattle: Why the wealthy are moving south
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) exec. Howard Schultz left Seattle to instead live in Miami. Market Domination host Josh Lipton, Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma, and Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré discuss what's behind this corporate trend. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

headline: Starbucks to Webcast 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: SEATTLE, March 11, 2026--Starbucks Coffee Company (NASDAQ: SBUX) will hold its Annual Meeting of Shareholders (Annual Meeting) on Wednesday, March 25, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time. The meeting, which will be held in a virtual format, can be accessed by shareholders and guests on the company’s website at investor.starbucks.com.

headline: Former Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz Announces Move to Miami Same Day as Washington Passes New Millionaires Tax
summary: Former Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz is the latest of many millionaires and billionaires leaving states after implementing a 'millionaires' tax.

headline: Ex-Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz Pays $44 Million for Florida Penthouse
summary: THE DEAL:  Howard Schultz,  the billionaire former chairman and chief executive of  Starbucks  has paid about $44 million for a penthouse at the Surf Club, Four Seasons Private Residences in Surfside, Fla., according to people familiar with the situation.  The deal coincides with Schultz’s announcement Tuesday that he and his wife, Sheri Schultz, have relocated to Florida.  “We have moved to Miami for our next adventure together,” he wrote in a statement on LinkedIn.

headline: Wolfe Research Turns Neutral on Starbucks (SBUX) amid Competitive Coffee Market
summary: Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ:SBUX) is included among the 14 Best American Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 9, Wolfe Research analyst Greg Badishkanian downgraded Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ:SBUX) to Peer Perform from Outperform after assuming coverage of the stock. The analyst did not set a price target. While “green shoots” are emerging from the company’s turnaround, […]
